Interface OperationContract

  • All Superinterfaces:

    All Known Subinterfaces:

    All Known Implementing Classes:

    public interface OperationContract
extends Contract

      Term getMod(LocationVariable heapVar, Term heapTerm, Term selfTerm, ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms, Services services)
      Returns the modifies clause of the contract.
      IProgramMethod getTarget()
      Returns the contracted function symbol.
      boolean hasModifiesClause(LocationVariable heap)
      Returns true iff the method (according to the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."

      • getTarget

        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Returns the contracted function symbol.
        Specified by:
        getTarget in interface Contract

      • hasModifiesClause

        boolean hasModifiesClause(LocationVariable heap)
        Returns true iff the method (according to the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
        Returns:
        whether this contract is strictly pure.
